hero.pill: 20+ years of engineering — now in Germany
hero.title: Sees what your inspectors miss.
hero.sub: TFT deploys defect detection, safety monitoring, and production transparency on the cameras and systems you already have — backed by over 20 years of global engineering experience, now with a local team in Berlin.

demo.caption: ↳ Illustrative representation. Runs on your existing camera and network infrastructure — no new hardware rollout required.

problem.stat: One in three German manufacturing companies struggles to fill technical positions. The shortage is already affecting production, quality, and efficiency.
problem.title: The skilled-labor shortage has already reached the shop floor.
problem.lead: Quality issues. Safety risks. Delays. Not because manufacturers lack technology — but because experienced specialists are increasingly hard to replace.

card1.title: Experienced eyes are running short
card1.text: Inspection and monitoring roles are among the hardest positions to fill.

card2.title: Know-how leaves with every retirement
card2.text: With every retirement, years of hands-on knowledge disappear from the operation.

card3.title: Every investment has to pay off
card3.text: Manufacturers need measurable results — not years-long transformation projects.

ctaStrip.text: Ready for a first look at your line? In a short conversation, we'll show you what a demo using your own camera or image footage could look like.

contact.title: 20 minutes. No pitch. Just an honest conversation.
contact.lead: Tell us where your bottleneck is — we'll tell you honestly whether and how we can help.
contact.leadEn: 20 minutes. No pitch. Just an honest conversation. Tell us where the bottleneck is — we will tell you honestly whether and how we can help.
